name: Fruit Tzimmes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the fruits in hot water; drain.
2. Combine with rice, honey, seasonings, and boiling water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer slowly until the rice is tender (20 to 30 minutes). Add a little water if necessary.
3. Heat flour in a small skillet until light brown, stirring constantly to prevent burning. Stir in butter. Slowly add water, stirring constantly. When the mixture is smooth and thick, stir it into the fruit.
4. Cook until the liquid has thickened. Transfer to a casserole dish and broil lightly for a few minutes. Serve hot as a dessert. Serves 6 to 8.
